doctify_about: The Fertility Clinic at Chelsea and Westminster Hospital is one of the most successful assisted conception units in the UK, offering a range of fertility treatment from ovulation induction to in vitro fertilisation (IVF) for both private and NHS-funded patients.  In 2020, we launched a satellite service in West Middlesex University Hospital to extend access to our care.  Our team of doctors, nurses, embryologists and counsellor are able to provide you with supportive and individualised care, to give you the best chance of conceiving.  From your first consultation through to your treatment and aftercare, our experienced team will work to give your treatment the highest chance of success while doing everything they can to ensure the whole experience is stress-free.  We have a special interest and expertise in the management of fertility difficulties in mature women, and couples with blood-borne infections. We also work closely with one of the only NHS specialists in male factor infertility.  Thanks to our experience of treating more than 1,000 couples a year since the clinic was founded in 1995, we are here to help if you are finding it difficult to conceive.

doctify_about: Fitzrovia Fertility is a London-based clinic offering expert, evidence-based care across all phases of reproductive health. Located on Manchester Street in the heart of the city, the clinic supports individuals and couples with a wide range of gynaecological and fertility needs. doctify_about: For nearly 100 years, The London Clinic has been at the forefront of independent healthcare in the UK, committed to delivering world-class care with compassion and innovation. Located in the prestigious Harley Street medical district, it is the UK’s largest independent charitable hospital, offering award-winning nursing care (LaingBuisson’s Nursing Team of the Year 2024) and treatment across a broad range of specialities.  The calibre of the consultants who work with us, the training and dedication of our staff and the range and complexity of the treatments we provide all make our hospital very special.  The London Clinic is one of only a handful of independent hospitals that operate as a charity. This means all our proceeds are re-invested back into the hospital, to advance healthcare for the benefit of our patients and the wider community.  A dedicated Cancer Care Hospital The London Clinic offers the most comprehensive range of cancer services of any UK independent single-site hospital. We manage the entire patient pathway, from screening and diagnostics to surgery, chemotherapy, radiotherapy, counselling, survivorship support and palliative care. Providing patients access to pioneering therapies such as CAR T-cell therapy, immunotherapy, robotic surgery, and molecular profiling. We were the first hospital to secure a 5* Macmillan Quality Environment Mark, first awarded in 2019 and retained in 2024.  Rapid Diagnostics Opened in 2024, our Rapid Diagnostics Centre (RDC) delivers fast-track specialist care for breast health, urology, gynaecology, and dermatology, alongside 24/7 GP services and a range of health assessments. Spanning six floors, the RDC features 14 consulting rooms, 11 diagnostic and treatment rooms, a 3T MRI AI supported scanner, advanced ultrasound, Horizon DEXA X-ray and contrast-enhanced mammography. We also offer biomarker testing (BRCA, CA125) and comprehensive genetic panels (12 and 72 gene). We’re committed to delivering early and accurate diagnosis, with an aim to see patients within 48 hours.  Urology Clinic The London Clinic specialises in all areas of male and female urology, offering a wide range of diagnostics including urine and blood tests (PSA, PSE), CT, MRI, bladder scans, Uroflowmetry, Flexible Cystoscopy, and Ultrasound. These tools help us diagnose and treat conditions such as prostate and bladder cancer, kidney stones, and erectile dysfunction. We are also a leading provider of Aquablation therapy, a minimally invasive robotic treatment for benign prostatic hyperplasia.

doctify_about: The London Pregnancy Clinic serves as a comprehensive hub for all your pregnancy needs, offering over 35 years of international expertise, exceptional care, and cutting-edge ultrasound technology. As pioneers in pregnancy scans and Fetal Medicine , our services include pregnancy scans starting at six weeks, and early Fetal Anomaly Scans at ten weeks combined with Non-Invasive Prenatal Testing (NIPT) to screen for chromosomal and structural abnormalities. Our experienced clinicians excel in detecting fetal anomalies and utilising advanced 3D/4D ultrasound imaging techniques. Our specialties encompass early anomaly scans, transvaginal ultrasound, and Non-Invasive Prenatal Screening.  Our esteemed Consultant Obstetricians provide private obstetric care in the form of comprehensive obstetric packages from early pregnancy stages.  The London Pregnancy Clinic's range of services extends beyond the three trimesters of pregnancy. Prior to conception, we specialise in gynaecology, reproductive health, and fertility assessments . We offer sophisticated scans such as Hysterosalpingo-Contrast-Sonography ( HyCoSy ), Follicle Tracking scans, and Endometrial Lining Gynae scans to prepare for fertility treatments. We also provide extensive Genetics Counselling services, via our partner Jeen Health , specialising in pre-conception carrier screening and hereditary diseases.  Additionally, we provide complementary services like Women's Health Physiotherapy during pregnancy and postnatal recovery programs.  Patients consistently describe the staff and clinicians at London Pregnancy Clinic as lovely, friendly, professional, and caring. doctify_about: The Fertility & Gynaecology Academy is a private fertility clinic specialising in assisted conception and gynaecological care. Established in 2004, the clinic provides a comprehensive range of fertility investigations and treatments for both female and male fertility concerns. It is licensed by the Human Fertilisation and Embryology Authority to carry out fertility treatments and related procedures, including embryo testing.  The clinic offers fertility assessments and diagnostic testing, alongside treatments such as in vitro fertilisation, intracytoplasmic sperm injection, intrauterine insemination and donor insemination. Fertility preservation services, including egg and sperm freezing, are also available. Care is provided for individuals and couples experiencing recurrent implantation failure or recurrent miscarriage, with treatment plans tailored to individual clinical needs.  The Fertility & Gynaecology Academy delivers treatment within dedicated clinical and laboratory facilities, including an on-site IVF laboratory. The multidisciplinary team includes fertility consultants, embryologists and clinical staff who support individuals throughout investigation, treatment and follow-up. Continuity of care is maintained through consultant-led management across each stage of treatment.  Consultations are available through self-referral or referral from healthcare professionals. doctify_about: LSDC Healthcare is a multidisciplinary private clinic based in central London near Liverpool Street, offering expert care across gastroenterology, general practice, urology, bariatric surgery, gynaecology, dermatology, women’s health, orthopaedics, and sports medicine. Since opening its flagship facility in 2022, the clinic has treated thousands of patients and continues to provide high-quality, consultant-led care with no waiting lists. All services are delivered in a modern, professional setting and supported by advanced diagnostic and treatment technologies.  The gastroenterology department offers a wide range of investigations and procedures, including gastroscopy, colonoscopy, endoscopic polyp removal, and haemorrhoidal banding. Further diagnostics include gastrointestinal physiology studies, breath tests for conditions such as SIBO, Bravo capsule pH testing, and private abdominal ultrasound. Treatment programmes also incorporate dietary therapies, voice therapy for related conditions, and complementary approaches for issues such as gastritis and functional dyspepsia.  Specialist procedures include the Stretta anti-reflux treatment, a minimally invasive option for patients with chronic acid reflux, and abdominal trigger point injections. Patients also have access to health screening packages covering a wide variety of needs including hormone profiles, coeliac screening, anaemia assessments, and full well-person checks.  LSDC Healthcare accepts both insured and self-pay patients and works with leading health insurance providers including BUPA, AXA, and Cigna. Payment plans and finance options are available for certain procedures. The clinic’s approach combines clinical excellence, compassionate care, and personalised treatment plans designed to address both immediate concerns and long-term health goals.  All consultants are highly qualified and fully registered, with a focus on making healthcare accessible, professional, and tailored to each individual’s needs. The clinic operates extended hours with early morning and evening appointments available throughout the week.  I had a very positive experience at LSDC Healthcare. Dr Albusoda was kind, thorough and helpful. Staff were friendly.
